name: 529 Plan 5-Year Gift Averaging

eligibility.description: Donors making large lump-sum contributions to a 529 plan exceeding the annual gift tax exclusion.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a donor to contribute up to five times the annual gift tax exclusion amount in a single year and elect to treat it as spread over five years for gift tax purposes.
